assertions.evidence: tests/test_e2e.py exists and pytest collected 16 tests successfully.
Fixtures temp_data_dir, state, and mock_analysis_result are defined in tests/test_e2e.py and fixture smoke tests passed.
mock_analysis_result contains Emma, 草坪, 15:00, direct_facts, and alias_candidates as verified by fixture test and source inspection.
TestCoreE2EFlow::test_full_script_to_matrix_flow passed, covering project creation through matrix verification.
TestCoreE2EFlow::test_script_analysis_to_deduction_flow passed, verifying _create_single_deduction creates a pending deduction.
TestCascadeE2E::test_cascade_after_filling_two_of_three passed, confirming cascade deduction in 3x3 setup.
TestCascadeE2E::test_cascade_no_result_with_ambiguity passed, confirming no deduction when ambiguity remains.
TestAcceptRejectE2E::test_accept_deduction_creates_fact passed, confirming Fact creation with source_type=ai_deduction and pending cleared.
TestAcceptRejectE2E::test_reject_deduction_creates_rejection passed, confirming rejection record creation and rejected status.
TestTimeSlotE2E::test_time_slot_add_sort_remove passed, covering sort, duplicate rejection, invalid format, and removal.
TestHintE2E::test_hint_add_and_remove passed, covering rule/hint add/remove behavior.
TestManualFactE2E::test_manual_fact_entry_and_deletion passed, covering matrix verification and deletion.

commandsRun.observation: Pytest collected 16 tests in tests/test_e2e.py and all 16 passed in about 1.22s.
Quiet rerun also passed with 16 passed in about 1.23s, confirming deterministic success.

frictions.description: Task-based flow validator subagent could not proceed due to permission mode, so validation was executed directly in the worker session.
